name: Wedding & Engagement
description: Timeless symbols of love, crafted with the world's finest diamonds. Each piece designed to mark life's most meaningful moment.

products.name: The Classic Solitaire
products.description: A round brilliant diamond set in a timeless six-prong platinum setting.

products.name: The Halo Embrace
products.description: A cushion-cut center stone surrounded by a delicate halo of micro-pavé diamonds.

products.name: Three Stone Legacy
products.description: Past, present, and future represented in three perfectly matched stones.

products.name: The Eternity Band
products.description: A continuous circle of matched diamonds, symbolizing never-ending love.

name: Rings
description: From statement cocktail rings to everyday elegance, each piece showcases exceptional stones in masterful settings.

products.name: The Sovereign
products.description: A bold emerald-cut diamond flanked by tapered baguettes in 18k gold.

products.name: Constellation Band
products.description: Scattered brilliant diamonds set flush in a wide platinum band.

products.name: The Pinnacle
products.description: An architectural marvel — a tension-set round brilliant that appears to float.

name: Earrings
description: Diamonds that catch the light with every turn. Studs, drops, and chandeliers for every occasion.

products.name: Classic Diamond Studs
products.description: Matched round brilliant diamonds in four-prong platinum settings.

products.name: The Cascade
products.description: Graduated pear-shaped diamonds descending in a graceful line.

products.name: Diamond Hoops
products.description: Inside-out diamond hoops with over 3 carats of brilliant rounds.

name: Necklaces & Pendants
description: From delicate solitaire pendants to dramatic statement necklaces, diamonds that rest close to the heart.

products.name: Solitaire Pendant
products.description: A single brilliant diamond suspended on an 18k white gold chain.

products.name: The Rivière
products.description: Graduated round brilliants in a seamless platinum necklace.

products.name: Diamond Bar
products.description: A modern horizontal bar set with princess-cut diamonds.

name: Custom Pieces
description: One-of-a-kind creations brought to life through our 3D CAD design process. Your vision, our craft.

products.name: The Aurora Ring
products.description: A custom-designed oval sapphire surrounded by a diamond halo, conceived in CAD.

products.name: Vintage Revival Pendant
products.description: An Art Deco-inspired pendant recreated from a family heirloom sketch.

products.name: The Dynasty Set
products.description: A matching engagement ring and wedding band designed as one unified piece.
